title: Tripadvisor Reviews Scraper Input
description: 📌 Input schema for the Tripadvisor Reviews Scraper actor.

reviewsPerPlace.title: Maximum number of results
reviewsPerPlace.description: The maximum number of reviews to scrape per place.

parseAllReviews.title: Parse all available results
parseAllReviews.description: If checked, the scraper will attempt to scrape all results

ratingIs.title: ⭐ Include Ratings
ratingIs.description: Restrict results to reviews with specific star ratings.

lang.title: 🗣️ Language (regex)
lang.description: Language to filter reviews by (e.g., 'es,fr'). When using this, only query and locale can be specified.

langselect.title: 🗣️ Language (select)
langselect.description: Language–country code for localization. Matches the country selector in the TripAdvisor website footer.

searchResultsDatasetId.title: 🗂 Use Results Datasets
searchResultsDatasetId.description: Select datasets containing search results from [Zillow Search Scraper](https://apify.com/api-ninja/zillow-search-scraper). When provided, the scraper will process all properties from these datasets. Note: The property field above must still contain at least one entry even when using datasets
